title: 3D Fighting Game Character Select Screen
description: Generate a dark, gritty, high-intensity 3D character selection screen inspired by brutal, arena-style modern fighting games.
subject: A young woman in her 20s with auburn hair, wearing a high-end cyberpunk leather jacket, grouped in an arena with 9 other fighters.
prompt_flat: Generate a cinematic, photorealistic portrait and character select screen with hyper-detailed skin textures, AAA 3D graphics, and dynamic lighting.

technical.render_type: hyper-realistic AAA 3D graphics with a gritty cinematic finish

rules: Make up a name for each character
Do not describe their physical appearance
Transform each into a realistic 3D fighter model
Each fighter must have a unique, powerful, combat-ready action pose

parameters.emotion: Confident, serene with a slight smirk

camera.shot_size: Medium close-up to Wide establishing shot
camera.angle: Low-angle heroic shot, eye-level slightly tilted (Dutch angle)
camera.perspective: Wide cinematic lens emphasizing power and scale
camera.composition: Rule of thirds, characters forming a curved arc
effects: depth of field tuned for dramatic silhouettes

type.primary: Harsh directional spotlight from above right
type.accent: Fiery warm-orange side lights and cold shadowy blue backlights

scene_lighting_rules: thick atmospheric fog with volumetric beams
lighting.palette: Teal and orange cinematic grading with magenta highlights

environment.arena: dark stone-and-metal arena platform with cracks, glowing fissures, and heavy atmosphere
environment.floor: rugged metallic floor with worn textures and faint reflections
environment.background: massive ceremonial statues, arcane symbols, chains, smoke plumes
environment.platforms: each character stands on their own circular engraved platform with glowing runes or energy lines

layout.arrangement: 10 characters displayed in a curved arc formation, each on their own platform
layout.spacing: wide spacing for clear silhouettes and dramatic pose readability
layout.hierarchy: central fighters slightly more forward, balanced left and right

ui_elements.character_name_plates: Rugged metallic plaques or glowing stone-like labels under each character, empty for later name entry.
ui_elements.interface_style: ancient-meets-modern combat UI with glowing edges, heavy metal textures, runic motifs and high-contrast menu frames

parameters.film_stock: Fujifilm Vision 3 emulation, subtle film grain

negative: plastic skin, airbrushed, CGI, 3D render, smooth makeup, bad anatomy, warped hands, extra limbs, watermark, basic UI, flat lighting, plain background
